selections.name: Hellfighter
selections.reason: Strong recent form on wet tracks, looks ready to peak here despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Vondel
selections.reason: Solid second at Hawkesbury last start, draws well and should map perfectly.

selections.name: Classic Two
selections.reason: Consistent type who can figure in the finish with a bit of luck from the wide gate.

selections.name: Macho Grande
selections.reason: Showed improvement second-up, gets a soft run from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Satono Jasmine
danger_horse.reason: Can improve third-up, capable of flashing late.

selections.name: Spiv
selections.reason: Broke through for a well-deserved win last start, maps well to go back-to-back.

selections.name: Flying Grey
selections.reason: Won nicely here last start, draws perfectly to get a similar run.

selections.name: Go Glenn
selections.reason: Solid form lines, just needs to overcome the tricky wide barrier.

selections.name: Pawa
selections.reason: Impressive maiden winner last start, faces a tougher task but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Cha Cha Cha
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to get a soft run on the rail, can sneak into the placings.

selections.name: Weekend Market
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start, gets a great draw and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Onmalone
selections.reason: Resuming with solid trial form, draws well to be prominent early.

selections.name: Sant Gervasi
selections.reason: Consistent maiden, will need luck from the wide gate but has the ability.

selections.name: Royal Air Force
selections.reason: First-up for the Waller stable, watch the market for a lead.

danger_horse.name: Cold Gin
danger_horse.reason: Can improve sharply on a firmer surface.

selections.name: Thyme To Go
selections.reason: Strong form in better races, gets the inside draw and should be hard to hold out.

selections.name: Tsardeal
selections.reason: Good effort when resuming, draws well and will strip fitter.

selections.name: Russian Reign
selections.reason: Solid placing last start, can figure if he gains a start.

selections.name: Declan
selections.reason: Has ability but dealt a terrible blow with the barrier draw.

danger_horse.name: Elska
danger_horse.reason: Fair debut, open to natural improvement.

selections.name: Cool Blaze
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly to utilize early speed, looks well placed in this field.

selections.name: Indecisive
selections.reason: Consistent performer, maps to get a nice run just behind the speed.

selections.name: Eagerly Awaits
selections.reason: Resuming, showed good ability last prep and can run well fresh.

selections.name: Zouking
selections.reason: Solid first-up run, will be fitter and can feature in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Hard Jakka
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well, capable of a bold showing on best form.

selections.name: Miss Farnan
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start, gets the inside draw to dictate terms.

selections.name: Girls Weekend
selections.reason: Strong win last time out, can overcome the tricky draw.

selections.name: Extrio
selections.reason: Resuming with a good fresh record, drawn to get every chance.

selections.name: Matchsticks
selections.reason: Solid effort last start, looks a nice value chance for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Diacon
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who maps well from a good gate.

selections.name: Zale
selections.reason: Class runner of the field, just needs to navigate the wide draw to be winning.

selections.name: Reign Of Honor
selections.reason: Broke maiden status nicely last start, draws perfectly to take the next step.

selections.name: Harry's Halo
selections.reason: Resuming, showed good promise last campaign and can run well fresh.

selections.name: Roma Green
selections.reason: Unbeaten in two starts, faces a test here but has upside.
